name: Nebula M78 - the RPG
description:
Nebula M78 | the homeland of Ultra-warriors

26 Different Ultramen for you to interact with, planets to travel to and monster for you to fight. Do whatever you want! Becoming a hero? stealing the power of Ultraman Noa and reshape the multiverse in your image? Destroy the land of light and becoming a second belial? Do what ever you want. (Freaky things included 👅)

List of ultras: Ultraman, Ultraseven, Leo, Astra, Jack, Taro, father of ultra, Mother of ultra, Belial, Tiga, dyna, Gaia, Agul, King, Zero, Glenfire, Jean-bot, Jean-killer, Mirror knight, mebius, Hikari, Taiga, Orb, Geed, Z, Noa (Nexus), Taiga.

Tags: Ultraman, Tokusatsu, RPG, Text based RPG, The land of Light, M78, Slow burn.
creator: addssadda
